name: AIsa Multi Search Engine
description: Requires python3, and AISA_API_KEY. Uses the supplied AISA_API_KEY to send requests to https://api.aisa.one. Native-first ClawHub plugin for `aisa-multi-search-engine`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Multi-source search engine powered by AIsa API. Combines Tavily web search, Scholar academic search, Smart hybrid search, and Perplexity deep research — all through a single AIsa API key. Includes confidence scoring and AI synthesis. Use when: the user needs web search, research, source discovery, or content extraction.

commands.name: aisa-multi-search-engine
commands.description: Multi-source search engine powered by AIsa API. Combines Tavily web search, Scholar academic search, Smart hybrid search, and Perplexity deep research — all through a single AIsa API key. Includes confidence scoring and AI synthesis. AISA_API_KEY.title: Aisa Api Key
AISA_API_KEY.description: Provide AISA_API_KEY for the packaged AIsa skill runtime.

providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Used only to authorize requests to the AIsa API service.
providerAuthChoices.cliDescription: AISA_API_KEY used by the packaged skill runtime.
